hero.heading: Discover refined living in signature estates.
hero.body: Alkraj Real Estate presents a curated portfolio of distinguished villas, penthouses, and land opportunities for clients who value privacy, architecture, and long-term confidence.

featured.label: Featured Estate
featured.title: Serenity Villa
featured.body: Private garden • grand lounge • gated community

intro.heading: Luxury real estate shaped around discretion and detail.
intro.body: From first shortlist to final negotiation, our advisory process is designed for calm decisions, transparent information, and properties that feel exceptional from the first arrival.

propertiesHeading.heading: Residences selected for architecture, location, and lifestyle.

properties.title: Grand Courtyard Estate
properties.body: A resort-inspired residence with formal entertaining zones, family lounges, landscaped decks, and a private arrival court.

properties.title: Skyline Duplex Residence
properties.body: Elevated city views, warm stone finishes, private terrace dining, and concierge-ready convenience.

properties.title: Minimal Garden Villa
properties.body: Clean architectural lines, double-height living, shaded verandas, and a quiet family-first floor plan.

properties.title: Code Name Plume
properties.body: Themed luxury 3 & 4 BHK apartments in Sector 22-D on Yamuna Expressway, positioned near NCR growth corridors with premium amenities and open green spaces.

experience.heading: Every visit is prepared like a private showing.
experience.body: We coordinate availability, neighborhood context, comparable pricing, documentation readiness, and investment rationale before each tour, so your time on site is focused and valuable.

process.title: Private discovery
process.body: We clarify lifestyle priorities, capital plan, and location fit.

process.title: Curated shortlist
process.body: Only aligned properties are presented with clear next steps.

services.heading: Services for discerning buyers, owners, and investors.

items.title: Luxury acquisition
items.body: Confidential buyer representation for premium villas, apartments, plots, and off-market opportunities.

items.title: Owner representation
items.body: Position your property with premium presentation, qualified enquiries, and negotiation support.

items.title: Investment advisory
items.body: Evaluate land, commercial spaces, rental yield, and development potential with a practical lens.

testimonial.quote: “The right home is not merely a transaction. It is a considered decision about space, privacy, and the life you want to build.”

contact.heading: Begin with a tailored property conversation.
contact.body: Share your preferred location, budget, and timeline. Our team will respond with a discreet shortlist or arrange a private viewing.
